email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketing Intern bij Octave. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentcreatie, en een groeiende interesse in cleantech, zie ik deze stage als een uitgelezen kans om bij te dragen aan jullie missie.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze vaardigheden sluiten naadloos aan bij jullie wens om LinkedIn, nieuwsbrieven, website-inhoud en SEO/GEO te versterken.

Ik ben creatief, proactief en niet bang om ideeën te pitchen. Mijn B1 Nederlands is voldoende voor professionele communicatie, en ik volg momenteel lessen om verder te verbeteren. De combinatie van marketing en de energiesector spreekt me enorm aan.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing Intern position at Octave. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, GEO, and content creation, and a growing interest in cleantech, I see this internship as a perfect opportunity to contribute to your mission.

In my current role at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress sites. On mirook.com, I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. These skills align well with your needs for LinkedIn, newsletters, website content, and SEO/GEO.

I am creative, proactive, and not afraid to pitch ideas. My B1 Dutch is sufficient for professional communication, and I am taking classes to improve further. The combination of marketing and the energy sector greatly appeals to me.

I look forward to discussing my motivation and experience in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Toen ik de vacature voor Marketing Intern bij Octave las, voelde ik meteen een klik. Jullie missie om energieopslag en -beheer te revolutioneren, gecombineerd met de hands-on marketingrol, sluit perfect aan bij mijn vaardigheden en ambitie.

Als junior digital marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) toegepast om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring maakt mij sterk in het versterken van online aanwezigheid, precies wat Octave zoekt.

Jullie vragen om creatieve ideeën voor campagnes en brand activations. Ik ben niet bang om out-of-the-box te denken en mijn voorstellen te pitchen. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling helpt me om snel te schakelen tussen content, SEO en website-optimalisatie. Ook het spotten van trends in de energiesector spreekt me aan; ik volg het cleantech-nieuws actief en zie kansen om die te vertalen naar marketingacties.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands momenteel B1 is, communiceer ik vlot in het Engels en Turks, en volg ik lessen om mijn Nederlands naar een hoger niveau te tillen. Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn leergierigheid en drive een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan jullie team.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear selection committee,

When I read the vacancy for Marketing Intern at Octave, I felt an immediate connection. Your mission to revolutionize energy storage and management, combined with the hands-on marketing role, aligns perfectly with my skills and ambition.

As a junior digital marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This experience makes me strong in enhancing online presence, exactly what Octave is looking for.

You ask for creative ideas for campaigns and brand activations. I am not afraid to think outside the box and pitch my proposals. My technical background in web development helps me switch quickly between content, SEO, and website optimization. Spotting trends in the energy sector also appeals to me; I actively follow cleantech news and see opportunities to translate them into marketing actions.

Although my Dutch is currently B1, I communicate fluently in English and Turkish, and I am taking lessons to improve my Dutch further. I am confident that with my eagerness to learn and drive, I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

I look forward to discussing my motivation in a personal interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- SEO & GEO expertise: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data, entity optimization, and GEO/AEO for AI search visibility
- Content creation: writing keyword-targeted blogs, managing website content, and building WordPress sites with Elementor
- Analytical skills: using Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to track performance and guide decisions
- Creative and proactive: not afraid to pitch ideas, with experience in social media integration and campaign support
- Interest in cleantech: actively following energy sector trends, eager to translate them into marketing opportunities
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
